setup.description: Walk a new user through installing the gws CLI, authenticating in the browser, and a live check — explaining each step.

check.description: Confirm gws install, auth, and real access with a live API call; name the broken link and its fix if any.

edit.description: Edit a Google Doc, Sheet, or Slides in place under the same fileId, with concurrency safety for shared files.

read.description: Read, export, or download a Workspace file's content, including from a Shared Drive.

versions.description: List a file's revision history and upload managed versions under the same fileId.
